prose:
**Aniline frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: built from the user-supplied `.xyz` file at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz`; this DFT calculation was a single point on that geometry and did not re-optimize it. SCF converged in 9 cycles.

HOMO = −5.553772 eV, LUMO = −0.2489544 eV → **gap ≈ 5.3048177 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy).

The command used was: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --solvent gas --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpo3skj24l/live.json`. No warnings were reported.
